creator: hashiz@meridiani.jp
text:
Now, gnome-power-manager did not cooperate with gnome-screensaver
            - At preference, idle_delay do not cooperate screensaver's one.
            - At daemon, did not set DPMS standby/off delay.

How-To-Repeat: 	install sysutils/gnome-power-manager and x11/gnome-screensaver
